Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 2,20, 3,30, 4,40 ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | project ck = coalesce(k, k1), lv = v, rv = v1 | order by ck asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), CAST(40 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT COALESCE(k, k1) AS ck, v AS lv, v1 AS rv FROM (SELECT L.k, COALESCE(L.v, '') AS v, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY ck ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y" ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | summarize n = count(), distinctv = count_distinct(v1) by k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, v)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS n, COUNT(DISTINCT v1) AS distinctv FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.v, '') AS v1 FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c", 4,"d" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y" ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | where isempty(rv) | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) WHERE (rv IS NULL OR CAST(rv AS VARCHAR) = '') ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c", 4,"d" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y" ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | where isnull(rv) | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) WHERE (rv IS NULL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(a:long, b:long, lv:string)[ 1,1,"p", 1,2,"q", 2,2,"r" ]; let R = datatable(a:long, b:long, rv:long)[ 1,2,100, 2,2,200, 9,9,900 ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on a, b | project la=a, lb=b, ra=a1, rb=b1, lv, rv | order by lv asc, rv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'q'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'r')) AS t(a, b, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(9 AS BIGINT), CAST(9 AS BIGINT), CAST(900 AS BIGINT))) AS t(a, b, rv)) SELECT a AS la, b AS lb, a1 AS ra, b1 AS rb, lv, rv FROM (SELECT L.a, L.b, COALESCE(L.lv, '') AS lv, R.a AS a1, R.b AS b1, R.rv FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.a IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.a AND L.b IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.b) ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST, rv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(a:long, b:long)[ 1,1, 1,2, 2,2 ]; let R = datatable(a:long, b:long)[ 1,2, 2,2, 9,9 ]; L | join kind=leftanti R on a, b | order by a asc, b asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(a, b)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(9 AS BIGINT), CAST(9 AS BIGINT))) AS t(a, b)) SELECT L.* FROM L AS L WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM R AS R WHERE L.a = R.a AND L.b = R.b) ORDER BY a ASC NULLS FIRST, b ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(a:long, b:long)[ 1,1, 1,2, 2,2 ]; let R = datatable(a:long, b:long)[ 1,2, 2,2, 9,9 ]; L | join kind=rightanti R on a, b | order by a asc, b asc

Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(a, b)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(a, b)) SELECT L.* FROM R AS L WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM L AS R WHERE R.a = L.a AND R.b = L.b) ORDER BY a ASC NULLS FIRST, b ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 1,"a2", 2,"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 1,"x2", 3,"z" ]; L | join kind=leftsemi R on k | order by lv asc

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 2,"c", 3,"d" ]; union withsource=src kind=outer A, B | summarize n=count() by src, x | order by src asc, x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(x, y)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT src, x, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ((SELECT *, 'union_arg0' AS src FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg1' AS src FROM (SELECT * FROM B))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY src ASC NULLS FIRST, x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 2,"c", 3,"d" ]; union withsource=tbl A, B | join kind=inner (A | project x, ay=y) on x | order by x asc, y asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(x, y)) SELECT L.*, R.* RENAME (x AS x1) FROM ((SELECT *, 'union_arg0' AS tbl FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg1' AS tbl FROM (SELECT * FROM B))) AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT x, y AS ay FROM A) AS R ON L.x IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.x ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST, y ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,100, 3,300, 5,500 ]; L | union R | summarize s=sum(v) by k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(300 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(5 AS BIGINT), CAST(500 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s FROM ((SELECT * FROM L) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM R)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:long)[ 1,10, 2,20 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:long)[ 1,100, 2,200 ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | extend k1 = k1 + 1000 | project k, k1, lv, rv | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT k, k1, lv, rv FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (k1), k1 + 1000 AS k1 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k)) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,100, 2,200 ]; let M = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,1000, 2,2000 ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | join kind=inner M on k | project k, v, v1, v2 | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), M AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1000 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2000 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT k, v, v1, v2 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k2, R.v AS v2 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) AS L INNER JOIN M AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 1,"a2", 2,"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 1,"x2", 2,"y" ]; L | lookup R on k | order by lv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a2'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x2'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 2,200, 3,300, 4,400 ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | extend mk = iff(isnull(k), k1, k), src = iff(isnull(k),"R", iff(isnull(k1),"L","both")) | order by mk asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(300 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), CAST(400 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT *, CASE WHEN (k IS NULL) THEN k1 ELSE k END AS mk, CASE WHEN (k IS NULL) THEN 'R' ELSE CASE WHEN (k1 IS NULL) THEN 'L' ELSE 'both' END END AS src FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY mk ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y" ]; L | join kind=inner (R | summarize rv2 = make_list(rv) by k) on k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv2 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT k, COALESCE(LIST(rv) FILTER (WHERE rv IS NOT NULL), []) AS rv2 FROM R GROUP BY ALL) AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(g:string, k:long)[ "a",1, "a",2, "b",3 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 2,200, 3,300 ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | summarize tot=sum(w) by g | order by g asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('a', CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(g, k)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(300 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(SUM(w), 0) AS tot FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, t:datetime)[ 1,datetime(2020-01-01), 2,datetime(2021-01-01) ]; let R = datatable(k:long, t:datetime)[ 1,datetime(2020-06-01), 3,datetime(2022-01-01) ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | extend diff = t1 - t | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00')) AS t(k, t)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2020-06-01 00:00:00'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 00:00:00')) AS t(k, t)) SELECT *, t1 - t AS diff FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.t AS t1 FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(x, y)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(x, y)) (SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME ((SELECT * FROM B) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM C)) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:long)[ 1,1, 2,2 ]; A | union A | union A | summarize n=count() by x | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x, y)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT x, COUNT(*) AS n FROM (((SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM A)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,1, 2,2, 3,3 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 2,2, 3,3, 4,4 ]; L | join kind=leftanti R on k | union (R | join kind=leftanti L on k) | order by k asc, v asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), CAST(4 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) (SELECT L.* FROM L AS L WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM R AS R WHERE L.k = R.k)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT L.* FROM R AS L WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM L AS R WHERE L.k = R.k)) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, v ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,11, 2,20 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 1,101, 2,200 ]; L | join kind=innerunique R on k | summarize n=count() by k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(11 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(101 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS n FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM (SELECT * FROM L QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k) = 1) AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,11, 1,12 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100 ]; L | join kind=innerunique R on k | order by v asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(11 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(12 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM (SELECT * FROM L QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k) = 1) AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY v ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y", 4,"z" ]; R | join kind=rightouter L on k | order by lv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.k, COALESCE(L.rv, '') AS rv, R.k AS k1, R.lv FROM R AS L RIGHT OUTER JOIN L AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(id:long, k:long, lv:string)[ 10,1,"a", 11,2,"b", 12,3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, id:long, rv:string)[ 1,99,"x", 2,98,"y" ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | project id, id1, k, lv, rv | order by id asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(10 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(11 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(12 AS BIGINT), CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(id, k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(99 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(98 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, id, rv)) SELECT id, id1, k, lv, rv FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.id AS id1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY id ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y", 3,"z" ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | project-away v1 | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, v)) SELECT * EXCLUDE (v1) FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y" ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | project-rename rv = v1, lv = v | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, v)) SELECT * RENAME (v1 AS rv, v AS lv) FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let R = datatable(rk:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 3,"z" ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on $left.k == $right.rk | project k, rk, lv, rv | order by lv asc, rv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(rk, rv)) SELECT k, rk, lv, rv FROM (SELECT L.k, COALESCE(L.lv, '') AS lv, R.rk, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.rk) ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST, rv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,5, 2,15, 3,25 ]; let R = datatable(lo:long, hi:long, label:string)[ 0,10,"low", 10,20,"mid", 20,30,"high" ]; L | extend bucket = case(v<10,"low", v<20,"mid","high") | join kind=inner (R | project label, bucket=label) on bucket | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(15 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(25 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(0 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT), 'low'), (CAST(10 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT), 'mid'), (CAST(20 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT), 'high')) AS t(lo, hi, label)) SELECT L.*, R.label, R.bucket AS bucket1 FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN v < 10 THEN 'low' WHEN v < 20 THEN 'mid' ELSE 'high' END AS bucket FROM L) AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT label, label AS bucket FROM R) AS R ON L.bucket IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.bucket ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(y:string, x:long)[ "c",3, "d",4 ]; let C = datatable(x:long, y:string, z:bool)[ 5,"e",true ]; union A, B, C | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('c', CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), ('d', CAST(4 AS BIGINT))) AS t(y, x)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT), 'e', TRUE)) AS t(x, y, z)) (SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM C) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, d:dynamic)[ 1,dynamic({"n":5}), 2,dynamic({"n":10}) ]; let R = datatable(k:long, d:dynamic)[ 1,dynamic([1,2]), 2,dynamic([3,4]) ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | project k, ln=d.n, rarr=d1 | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), '{"n":5}'::JSON), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), '{"n":10}'::JSON)) AS t(k, d)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), LIST_VALUE(1, 2)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), LIST_VALUE(3, 4))) AS t(k, d)) SELECT k, json_extract(d, '$.n') AS ln, d1 AS rarr FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.d AS d1 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 2,200 ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | extend tot = v + coalesce(w, 0) | summarize sum(tot) | project sum_tot
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT sum_tot FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tot), 0) AS sum_tot FROM (SELECT *, v + COALESCE(w, 0) AS tot FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k)))

Kql: let A = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20 ]; let B = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,100, 3,300 ]; let C = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 2,2000, 3,3000 ]; union withsource=t A, B, C | summarize total=sum(v), n=count() by k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(300 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2000 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(3000 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ((SELECT *, 'union_arg0' AS t FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg1' AS t FROM (SELECT * FROM B)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg2' AS t FROM (SELECT * FROM C))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y", 3,"z" ]; L | where k > 1 | join kind=inner (R | where k < 3) on k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM (SELECT * FROM L WHERE k > 1) AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM R WHERE k < 3) AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST
